calendar.matters:
Re-Ntc Of Second Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Assignment Of Rights Restraining Order And Turnover Order For Funds Held By Credit Card Processors Due Judgment Debtors
Off Calendar Nov-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Second Motion For Assignment Of Rights Restraining Order And Turnover Order For Funds Held By Credit Card Processors Due Judgment Debtors.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer: W. Trupek, Not reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 585(A)
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter is on Calendar this day for Default Judgment Hearing as to Defendant M. Caroline Jones aka Caroline Jones, D.D.S. aka Dr. Caroline Jones and Doing business as Great American Smiles.

Dept. 505; Judge: Sylvia L. Husing; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:31 p.m., and concluded at 2:42 p.m. (D505)

David Julian Cook, Esq., appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Align Technology Inc. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant M. Caroline Jones not appearing.
Witness for the Plaintiff Kent Alleyne Henry was placed under oath and testified via Zoom Video Conference.
Jamie Onuki; CSR #13904 for Plaintiff Align Technology Inc. via Zoom Video Conference.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Collections filed May 5, 2023.
Proof of Personal Service as to Defendant M. Caroline Jones aka Caroline Jones, D.D.S. aka Dr. Caroline Jones and Doing business as Great American Smiles filed June 30, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant M. Caroline Jones aka Caroline Jones, D.D.S. aka Dr. Caroline Jones and Doing business as Great American Smiles on July 10, 2023.

The Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:

Exhibit A: Statement of Account
Exhibit B: Written Terms and Conditions of Plaintiff.
Exhibit C: Written Terms of Contract.

Witness is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.

The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Align Technology Inc. and against Defendant M. Caroline Jones aka Caroline Jones, D.D.S. aka Dr. Caroline Jones and Doing business as Great American Smiles as follows:

Damages: $46,167.23
Interest: $1,744.32
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $560.00

Proposed Judgment signed and filed this date.
